# AudienceIntent
> AudienceIntent is a Business Performance Architecture company that builds and runs Revenue Capture Engine — a done-for-you business operating system for local businesses across the United States.

## What We Do
AudienceIntent builds and operates Revenue Capture Engine, a fully managed system that handles the operational gaps costing local businesses revenue every day: missed calls, slow lead follow-up, AI search invisibility, lack of reviews, unanswered DMs, and dormant CRM leads.

Everything is done for the client. No dashboards to manage. No tasks added to their day. The system runs in the background and creates measurable outcomes.

## Revenue Capture Engine Components
- Google Business Profile management — fully optimised and managed weekly
- AI Search Visibility — citations built and maintained across ChatGPT, Google AI, Perplexity, and Siri
- Lead Reactivation Campaigns — automated sequences that convert dormant CRM contacts into booked revenue
- Speed-to-Lead Automation — every new lead receives an automated response within 60 seconds
- After-Hours Voice Agent — answers calls after hours, books appointments, answers FAQs
- Website and Social Chat AI — instant responses to every visitor 24/7
- Social DM Automation — every Instagram and Facebook DM answered instantly
- Automated Review Engine — review requests sent automatically after every job
- Review Monitoring and Sharing — platforms monitored, negative reviews flagged immediately

## Pricing
- $997 per month (early access pricing — increasing to $4,797/month)
- Month-to-month. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
- 30-day money-back guarantee if not live and functioning within 30 days

## Who It Is For
Local businesses that already receive inbound calls, form fills, or website enquiries. Industries served include trades, professional services, health and wellness, hospitality, and home services. One client per industry per market — exclusivity guaranteed.

## Founder
Kevin Bovett founded AudienceIntent in 2025 in Fort Myers, Florida.

## Free Tools
- Free Business Performance Report: https://report.audienceintent.ai
- Lost Revenue Calculator: https://lostrevenue.audienceintent.ai

## Client Results
- Blingle Premier Lighting: $36,000 recovered from lead reactivation in under two weeks
- ActivatedYou: 22% conversion rate, outperformed internal marketing team on CTR and revenue per message
- GoldenCrest Metals: 5 new sales calls booked in week one from after-hours voice and chat
- Craft Food Tours: System paid for itself in under one week through Google ranking improvement

## Charity
AudienceIntent funds clean water access for one person per client per month through charity: water. 100% of donations go directly to water projects.
